description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Release Game that triggers on pull requests to the release branch. The workflow should have a single job running on windows-latest that checks out the code, installs Python 3.12, and then performs a series of steps to build and package a game, including installing dependencies, running Nuitka, building game config and cache, copying game files, packing them into a zip archive, and uploading the archive as a release asset.
